overall.description: Game footage from The Witcher 3 showing the character Geralt exploring the sunlit palace gardens of Beauclair in Toussaint. The character walks along ornate stone terraces and winding pathways before entering a glass greenhouse conservatory.

agents.ego_description: Geralt stands on the terrace looking at distant ruins, then walks along the curved terrace admiring the panoramic valley view

entered.detail: light-colored stone tiles forming the terrace surface
decorative carved stone balustrade with lantern posts
ancient stone ruins visible on the hillside across the valley
lush green valley with rolling hills and scattered trees
ornate metal lanterns mounted on stone pillars

segments.scene_description: Geralt stands on a sunlit stone terrace overlooking a lush valley with distant ruins. He walks along the curved terrace with ornate railings, taking in the panoramic view of the mountains and ancient structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered garden walkway with stone arches

events.description: exits open terrace into covered garden walkway with stone arches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the garden path lined with stone balustrades and arches

entered.detail: irregular stone paving stones forming the garden path
series of stone arches forming a covered walkway structure
classical stone sculptures on pedestals among the greenery
trimmed green hedges lining the pathway
natural rock outcrop integrated into the garden design

segments.scene_description: Leaving the terrace, Geralt enters a covered garden walkway with ornate stone arches and statues. The path winds through manicured hedges and rocky outcrops, providing shade from the bright sun.

events.description: begins ascending stone stairs leading upward
passes through stone archway into upper garden with city views

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs and walking along upper path with views of distant city and lake

entered.detail: wide stone steps leading upward through the garden
tall cylindrical palace tower with narrow windows
arched wooden structure for climbing plants
view of Beauclair city with red rooftops in the distance
blue lake visible between the mountains beyond the city

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends a flight of stone stairs beside a tall palace tower, passing through an archway into an upper garden. The path offers expansive views of the distant city and a mountain lake.

scene_state.functional_zone: pathway along palace tower with city overlook

events.description: passes by NPC walking in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding path toward the greenhouse, passing an NPC in blue clothing

notable_agents.action: walking down the stone path in the opposite direction wearing a blue tunic

entered.detail: large greenhouse structure with glass walls and ornate stone frame
small ornate bridge crossing a garden stream
tall narrow evergreen trees lining the path
blooming red roses in garden beds

segments.scene_description: Walking along the palace perimeter, Geralt passes a decorative bridge and approaches a glass greenhouse. He passes an NPC walking the other way as the path curves around the tower with views of the city below.

events.description: enters the greenhouse through large glass doors

agents.ego_description: walking into the greenhouse and approaching the central fountain while looking around the interior

entered.detail: high vaulted ceiling made of glass panels and metal framework
central stone fountain with water feature
large green ferns in terracotta pots
trailing red flowers hanging from the ceiling structure
tall stained glass windows at the far end of the greenhouse

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters the greenhouse through large glass doors into a humid conservatory filled with ferns and hanging flowers. Sunlight streams through the glass ceiling above a central stone fountain, creating a warm, sheltered environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open, sun-drenched terraces of a palace overlooking a vast valley into the humid, sheltered interior of a glass conservatory. It begins with Geralt walking along a curved stone terrace with ornate railings, taking in panoramic views of distant ruins and mountains. As he leaves the open air, the scene shifts into a shaded garden walkway characterized by stone arches, statues, and manicured hedges before ascending a flight of stairs beside a tall palace tower. The path then winds along the palace perimeter, passing a decorative bridge and a fellow traveler while offering expansive vistas of a distant city and mountain lake. Finally, the camera follows Geralt through large glass doors into a lush greenhouse, where sunlight streams through the ceiling onto a central stone fountain and hanging flowers.
